verse_text: Thus you shall say to them, 'Let the gods that did not make heaven and earth perish from the earth and from under this heaven.'

links.context: The prophecy refers to the Incarnation, when the Son of God takes on human flesh, becoming like us. Similar passages are [[EXO.15:11]]; [[PSA.85:8]]; [[JER.10:6]], [[JER.10:7]].

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
